title: Sync config tiers, mobile CI smoke, onboard E2E and locale

sources.reason: Stack tier section drifted from README and check_docs_metadata constants.
Existing real-stack and extended-stack smoke patterns for new mobile presets.
Add locale output and E2E coverage target.
Fresh install E2E pattern for onboard journey test.

riskAssessment.reason: Mobile stack CI depends on hosted runner toolchains for Flutter, Android SDK, and Swift.

executionDecision.reason: Scope, acceptance, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Verify compatibility.yml mobile-stack-quality job definitions before promoting flutter, android, and swift to verified.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Cross-cutting docs, CI, runtime script, and metadata guard changes.

acceptance: docs/configuration.md includes stack tier marker and prose aligned with README and check_docs_metadata.
check_docs_metadata validates configuration.md tier marker consistency.
compatibility.yml runs hosted smoke for flutter, android, and swift; system_invariants and README tiers list them as verified.
tests/test_onboard_e2e.py exercises install plus full ai-onboard three-phase path.
ai_onboard supports --locale ja and LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8 Japanese output.
ai_doctor.py and ai_finish.py remain at or above 85% critical coverage floors.
guidelines: Tier markers in docs must match check_docs_metadata VERIFIED_STACKS and system_invariants.json.
Japanese onboard strings must follow JAPANESE_STYLE_RULES.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User requested updates to .ai/README.md and system_invariants.json.

rollbackNote: Revert configuration tier sync, mobile CI job, onboard locale/E2E changes, and tier marker updates.
